meaning: int.表示惊讶,高兴,嘲弄时所发声音
examples: Oho, you are a true partner.
Oho! Today is my lucky day!
Tina Newman (OHO 2008011719501, March 30, 2011), in which registered person Newman was Barred for improper use of her corporate credit card.
Steven Robert Tomlinson, Respondent (OHO Hearing Panel Decision, March 21, 2013).
